cases.setup: Interrupted range transfer resumes with same source validators/digest, destination partial alias, protocol, chunk scheme, encryption and idempotency key.
ETag/provider version/expected digest changes before resume.
assertions: new Run or full restart required

cases.setup: Partial destination alias/generation was replaced.
assertions: do not append to unknown target

cases.setup: Upload/multipart completion returns success but no full digest/read-back/Location registration exists.
Transport completes but canonical Content digest differs.
Streaming ingest has unknown initial size; final close computes digest and atomically registers Content/Location.
Two callbacks/Attempts try to finalize same logical Run/idempotency key.
Transport domain passes but content/read-back domain fails.
Expired/wrong-generation cursor is used without rescan.
Both endpoints changed from common base.
One endpoint renames unchanged logical Object.
One endpoint tombstones while other modifies.
Cursor moves past change before destination digest/read-back/acceptance.
assertions: cursor remains at last accepted state

cases.setup: Current bidirectional sync is reported as recoverable historical backup.
Reviewed conflict merge creates new revision.
Sync tombstone triggers shared Content byte deletion without retention/reference/copy checks.
Active Backup Policy displayed as successful backup.
Snapshot marked complete with failed/missing/unknown required entry.
Incremental snapshot references parent/chunks and restore dependency graph.
Manifest digest passes but chunk is missing/corrupt.
Sampled read-back labeled full verification.
Ciphertext digests pass but key missing/revoked/unauthorized.
Prune removes parent/chunk required by retained restore point.
Held snapshot/chunk is selected for deletion.
Dry run passes dependency/retention/hold/copy checks, deletion receipted, repository reverified.
Selected backup entries restore to verified Content/Locations.
Backup restore marks Workspace/application recovered without WP05 Restore/Recovery Verification.
Decision is partially_restorable but full scope mutates without approval.
Restore target has divergent current revision.
Missing/corrupt replica is observed, explicit Transfer repair runs, new Location verification passes.
One current healthy replica is claimed as retained backup history.
Transfer/sync/backup Provider changes.
One transfer/sync/backup fails while unrelated Workspace Activities continue.
